allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./lib/db.js'\).catch\(\(\)=>import\('pg'\).then\(async m=>{const {Pool}=m.default||m;const p=new Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);const r=await p.query\('SELECT id, name, slug, parent_id FROM categories ORDER BY sort_order, name'\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.rows,null,2\)\);await p.end\(\);}\)\)")
PowerShell(if \($?\) { "Node processes found" } else { "� All stopped" })

PowerShell(\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8443 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "Ready")

Bash(node --env-file=.env -e "import\('pg'\).then\(async \({default:pg}\)=>{const p=new pg.Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);const r=await p.query\(\\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' ORDER BY table_name\\"\);console.log\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.table_name\).join\('\\n'\)\);await p.end\(\);}\)")

Bash(node --env-file=.env -e "import\('pg'\).then\(async \({default:pg}\)=>{const p=new pg.Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);try{const r=await p.query\('SELECT * FROM _schema_migrations ORDER BY 1'\);console.log\('_schema_migrations:',r.rows\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('no _schema_migrations',e.message\)};const r2=await p.query\('SELECT * FROM schema_migrations ORDER BY 1'\);console.log\('schema_migrations:',r2.rows\);await p.end\(\);}\)")

Bash(node --env-file=.env -e "import\('pg'\).then\(async \({default:pg}\)=>{const p=new pg.Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);await p.query\('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS schema_migrations'\);console.log\('dropped'\);await p.end\(\);}\)")

Bash(node --env-file=.env -e "import\('pg'\).then\(async \({default:pg}\)=>{const p=new pg.Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);const c=await p.query\('SELECT count\(*\)::int FROM categories'\);const pr=await p.query\('SELECT count\(*\)::int FROM products'\);const pv=await p.query\('SELECT count\(*\)::int FROM product_variants'\);const pc=await p.query\('SELECT count\(*\)::int FROM product_categories'\);console.log\({categories:c.rows[0].count,products:pr.rows[0].count,variants:pv.rows[0].count,product_categories:pc.rows[0].count}\);const recent=await p.query\(\\"SELECT id,name,created_at FROM products ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10\\"\);console.log\('recent products:',recent.rows\);await p.end\(\);}\)")

Bash(node --env-file=.env -e "import\('pg'\).then\(async \({default:pg}\)=>{const p=new pg.Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);const r=await p.query\(\\"SELECT id,name,created_at FROM products ORDER BY created_at ASC\\"\);console.log\('all products by created_at asc:'\);r.rows.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.created_at.toISOString\(\),'-',x.name\)\);await p.end\(\);}\)")

Bash(node --env-file=.env -e "import\('pg'\).then\(async \({default:pg}\)=>{const p=new pg.Pool\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL}\);const c=await p.query\('SELECT count\(*\)::int FROM categories'\);const pr=await p.query\('SELECT count\(*\)::int FROM products'\);const v=await p.query\('SELECT count\(*\)::int FROM product_variants'\);const pc=await p.query\('SELECT count\(*\)::int FROM product_categories'\);console.log\({categories:c.rows[0].count,products:pr.rows[0].count,variants:v.rows[0].count,product_categories:pc.rows[0].count}\);const all=await p.query\('SELECT name FROM products'\);console.log\('products:',all.rows.map\(r=>r.name\)\);await p.end\(\);}\)")
